features.featureTitle: Add a new frontend route `/admin/upgrade` to the existing TanStack Router configuration in `frontend/src/App.tsx`. This route must require only that the user is logged in (no role restriction). The page must render: a title "Admin Upgrade", a text input labelled "Enter Admin Setup Code", and a button labelled "Upgrade to Admin". On button click, call the backend `upgradeCurrentUserToAdmin` function with the entered code. On success, redirect the user to `/admin/dashboard`. On failure, display the error message returned by the backend. This route must NOT be linked or referenced anywhere in the UI — it is accessible by direct URL only.
